channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Egypt Advances to World Cup Last 16 After Penalty Shootout Victory Over Australia
item.description: Egypt made history by defeating Australia 4-2 in a penalty shootout to advance to the FIFA World Cup 2026 last 16. The match, held at Dallas Stadium in Arlington, ended 1-1 after extra time, forcing a...

item.title: England and Mexico World Cup Match Kick-off Time Remains Unchanged Despite Weather Concerns
item.description: The article details the ongoing uncertainty surrounding the kick-off time for the England vs Mexico World Cup 2026 last-16 match. Initially, FIFA considered rescheduling the game from its original 1am...

item.title: Helping children cope with disappointment after the Socceroos' World Cup exit
item.description: The article discusses how Australian children may feel devastated after the Socceroos' World Cup campaign ended, highlighting the emotional impact of sports events on young fans. It emphasizes the imp...

item.title: INEC extends voter registration deadline and launches online registration
item.description: The Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) has extended the nationwide Continuous Voter Registration (CVR) exercise by two weeks, pushing the deadline from July 10 to July 24, 2026. This dec...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial and Legal Defense Proceedings
item.description: The Senate Impeachment Court has summoned Vice President Sara Duterte to face her trial, prompting Palace Press Officer Undersecretary Claire Castro to emphasize the importance of the Vice President c...

item.title: Alberta's New Pipeline Plan Highlights Indigenous Collaboration and Economic Benefits
item.description: The article discusses Alberta's new pipeline plan, which emphasizes collaboration with Indigenous communities and economic benefits. It highlights the government's efforts to integrate Indigenous supp...

item.title: MLB trade deadline 2025: Key team updates and player movements
item.description: The article provides an overview of the 2025 MLB trade deadline, highlighting significant transactions and strategic moves by various teams. It discusses how teams like the Miami Marlins are bolsterin...

item.title: Sea anemone study reveals alternative antiviral immune system and new evolutionary strategies
item.description: Researchers have identified an unexpected antiviral defense mechanism in sea anemones that differs fundamentally from the immune strategies observed in humans and other vertebrates. The study focuses ...

item.title: Police say accused in Pune murder case used coded chats; custody extension denied by court
item.description: In the Pune murder case involving realtor Ketan Agarwal, police informed the court that accused Siya Goyal and Chetan Chaudhary allegedly used signs and coded language in their mobile phone chats, whi...

item.title: Zohran Mamdani's Speech Contrasts MAGA's Vision with America's Inclusive History
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered a speech commemorating the 250th anniversary of the United States, emphasizing the nation's inclusive history shaped by immigrants. He criticized MAGA's an...

item.title: Fox News host's outburst highlights escalating tensions in tight Texas Senate race
item.description: Fox News host Emily Compagno delivered a fiery on-air tirade against Democratic Senate candidate James Talarico, calling him a 'demon in human skin' during a discussion on her show 'Outnumbered.' The ...

item.title: Prince William discusses football and World Cup on podcast with Travis Kelce
item.description: Prince William has joined Travis Kelce, fiancé of Taylor Swift, on a podcast to discuss his love for football and the upcoming World Cup. The interview, released ahead of Kelce's upcoming wedding, hig...

item.title: Government Directs Apple and Google to Remove 7 Chinese Apps Over E-Rickshaw Shutdown Concerns
item.description: The Indian government has directed tech giants Apple and Google to remove seven Chinese apps from their app stores, citing concerns over their potential role in a recent e-rickshaw shutdown incident. ...

item.title: Gordie Howe Bridge Construction Costs Remain at $6.4 Billion Despite Multiple Delays
item.description: The Gordie Howe International Bridge connecting Windsor and Detroit remains at a total cost of $6.4 billion CAD despite multiple delays, according to the Windsor-Detroit Bridge Authority (WDBA). The p...

item.title: EBRD Commits $1.5bn to Nigeria's Economic Reforms and Development
item.description: The European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD) has set a target of investing at least $1.5 billion in Nigeria over the next three years, driven by improving macroeconomic reforms, rising ...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's Lavish Wedding at Madison Square Garden
item.description: Taylor Swift and NFL tight end Travis Kelce hosted an extravagant wedding at Madison Square Garden, drawing an array of celebrities, athletes, and fans. The event, described as a 'party of the century...

item.title: Government Proceeds with Plunder Charges Against Marcoleta Despite INC Protests
item.description: The Philippine government has moved forward with plunder charges against Senator Rodante Marcoleta, a prominent member of the Iglesia Ni Cristo, despite widespread protests from the religious group. P...

item.title: Egypt advances to World Cup round of 16 after penalty shootout victory over Australia
item.description: Egypt secured their place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 16 with a dramatic 4-2 penalty shootout victory over Australia after a 1-1 draw in extra time at Dallas Stadium. The match, which saw both...

item.title: Oxford researchers develop risk calculator to assess rare muscle side effects of statins
item.description: Researchers at the University of Oxford have developed a new clinical calculator designed to estimate an individual’s risk of developing serious muscle disorders from statin medications. Statins are w...

item.title: Toronto Maple Leafs secure top prospect Gavin McKenna with entry-level contract
item.description: The Toronto Maple Leafs have officially signed first-round draft pick Gavin McKenna to an entry-level contract, marking a significant step in the team's rebuilding efforts. McKenna, selected in the 20...
